title: Premium Whisky Glasses Set of 4 205ml 100% Lead Free Heavy Base Whiskey Glass, Tumbler Glasses, Scotch Bourbon Drinkware, Whisky Tumblers, Irish Whiskey
features: Classic 205ml Whisky Glass: A timeless whisky tumbler with an elegant, cylindrical shape and refined detailing — perfect for enjoying whisky, bourbon or scotch in style.
Versatile for Multiple Drinks: Ideal not only for whisky but also for cocktails, rum, gin, juice, or water. A classy glass that fits any home bar or dining table.
Elegant & Comfortable Design: Balanced weight and smooth rim for a pleasant drinking experience. The classic cut design adds a touch of sophistication to every sip.
Durable & Lead-Free Glass: Made from premium, lead- and cadmium-free glass for safe everyday use. Crystal-clear transparency highlights the colour of your drink beautifully.
Perfect Gift for Whisky Lovers: A stylish and practical gift for him or her — ideal for birthdays, Father’s Day, or Christmas. Great addition to any barware collection.
description: Classic 205ml Whisky Glass: A timeless whisky tumbler with an elegant, cylindrical shape and refined detailing — perfect for enjoying whisky, bourbon or scotch in style.
